qas.q: When using a halide leak detector, the bluish flame turning green indicates...
qas.a: a refrigerant leak

qas.q: On a manifold gauge assembly, the vacuum hose is 3/8 inch and the other hoses are 1/4 inch because larger sizes allow for...
qas.a: fewer restrictions which makes it easier and quicker to pull a vacuum

qas.q: Why should the manifold gauge assembly not be used when measuring a vacuum?
qas.a: The gauge assembly reads inches of mercury and is not accurate when pulling deep vacuums

qas.q: While taking a reading with an infrared thermometer, what happens as you get further from the object being measured?
qas.a: The reading becomes more inaccurate

qas.q: What part of the combustion analyzer gets placed into the stack?
qas.a: The probe

qas.q: What transfers flue gases from the boiler stack to the indicator unit?
qas.a: A tube and hand bulb

qas.q: The special slide-rule calculator and CO2 indicator are used to determine...
qas.a: combustion efficiency and stack loss

qas.q: What will occur if you choose more than one conductor to measure when using a clamp on meter?
qas.a: Incorrect readings

qas.q: A megohmmeter should never be used on a live circuit because...
qas.a: if has its own power source and it will ruin the meter

qas.q: A capacitance checker is used to test...
qas.a: a capacitor

qas.q: A photo tachometer is used to read the...
qas.a: revolutions per minute (RPM) of a spinning motor shaft

qas.q: When using the stroboscope, the frequency and reading is displayed for the technician when the object appears to be...
qas.a: standing still and the rpm of the equipment matches

qas.q: What pressure will be given if both tubes are connected to the inclined manometer?
qas.a: Velocity pressure

qas.q: Magnehelic pressure gauges were developed to...
qas.a: overcome the disadvantages of the inclined and inclined vertical manometer

qas.q: Why does the magnehelic gauge need more frequent calibration?
qas.a: Because it is a mechanical instrument and is sensitive to physical abuse, dirt, dust, corrosive gases, and fluids

qas.q: Why is the accuracy at the filters, louvers, and coils very rough?
qas.a: Due to the uncertainty of the Ak (correction factor) area****

qas.q: In order to be measured by the flow hood, how is all of the air forced to flow through the diffuser or grille?
qas.a: A flow hood or capture box completely surrounds and covers a diffuser or grille

qas.q: When are flow hoods especially practical?
qas.a: In existing buildings where the manufacturers or Ak factors of the outlets are not known

qas.q: If you need a tool that functions as a balancing flowmeter you should select...
qas.a: a circuit tester

qas.q: When pipe is needed for a high pressure application you should select...
qas.a: extra strong pipe

qas.q: Pipe should not be threaded when it is...
qas.a: a wall thickness less than standard weight

qas.q: When would flanges be installed?
qas.a: Wherever it may be necessary to open the joint for service or replacement of components

qas.q: What must be done before you apply pressure on the dies?
qas.a: Be sure you have the oil running to help start the segments on the pipe

qas.q: How are the die segments released?
qas.a: Release lever

qas.q: After you clean the threads of the fitting with a wire brush, what is the next step?
qas.a: Apply a small amount of pipe joint compound to the male threads

qas.q: After you screw the fitting hand tight on the pipe in a clockwise direction you immediately...
qas.a: select a pipe wrench size

qas.q: After you screw the coupling on the pipe hand-tight without using a vise, the next step is to?
qas.a: select two wrenches

qas.q: Aluminum tubing is mostly used in...
qas.a: the manufacture of evaporators for domestic refrigerators

qas.q: Stainless steel tubing is used
qas.a: with milk-handling systems, ice cream manufacture, and in food processing

qas.q: If you are required to make connections between steel pipe and copper pipe, which fitting would you choose?
qas.a: An adapter

qas.q: What is done immediately after the tubing has been cut with a tube cutter?
qas.a: Use the tube reamer on the cutter to remove the burr inside the tube

qas.q: The first step in cutting tubing with a hacksaw is to select which hacksaw blade
qas.a: 32 teeth per inch

qas.q: After slipping the nut on the tubing the next step is to
qas.a: insert the end of the tubing into the correct-sized hole in the flaring block

qas.q: When fabricating a single flare, the next step after you tighten the block's clamp is to
qas.a: place refrigerant oil on the flaring cone

qas.q: The gate valve is not suitable for throttling flow because
qas.a: the velocity of flow against the partly opened valve may cause vibration and damage

qas.q: What does the mixing valve do when the leaving water temperature rises above set point?
qas.a: It will throttle back the hot water and "open up" the cold water

qas.q: What position should the service valve be in during normal operation?
qas.a: Back seated

qas.q: Cracking a service valve will
qas.a: prevent a pressure rush

qas.q: What type of cross connection exists if the spout on a sink faucet extends below the overflow rim?
qas.a: Indirect

qas.q: What hazard may cause a significant change in water quality?
qas.a: Class II.

qas.q: When should the air gap be used?
qas.a: Whenever possible

qas.q: To completely burn acetylene, it is not necessary to supply all 1½ parts of oxygen because
qas.a: a portion of the oxygen is derived from the air surrounding the flame

qas.q: When will the safety plugs in acetylene cylinders melt?
Care must be taken to prevent propane/butane torch hose damage to
qas.a: prevent a possible fire

qas.q: What is the last step in operating the propane/butane torch?
qas.a: Store the assembly in a safe and cool place

qas.q: Oxygen valve threads are right handed to
qas.a: keep you from confusing the oxygen connection with the acetylene connections

qas.q: The gases from the oxygen and acetylene cylinders are mixed in the
qas.a: mixing head

qas.q: How can a regulator leak be detected?
qas.a: A gradual pressure rise on the working pressure gauge after the cylinder or manifold valve is opened.

qas.q: What could occur if copper is used to replace a brass hose splice?
qas.a: Copper acetylene is formed which explodes violently

qas.q: Each acetylene and oxygen cylinder valve is cracked to
qas.a: blow out any dirt that may be lodged in the outlet nipple

qas.q: What is the first step in disassembling an oxyacetylene outfit?
qas.a: Be sure the gas supply is off

qas.q: Using a torch wrench helps prevent
qas.a: rounding of corners on connecting and union nuts

qas.q: Soft metals are used for soldering because
qas.a: they have low melting points

qas.q: What is the next step after you think the metal is at the solder's melting point and you place the flame at the center of the fitting?
qas.a: Touch the solder to the bottom of the joint

qas.q: What is a cause for solder not staying on a joint?
qas.a: The melting point and flow points are too close together.

qas.q: Why should 95/5 solder never be used on the discharge line of a refrigerant system?
qas.a: It will become weak and leak

qas.q: How is energy used in the HVAC/R career field?
qas.a: It is converted

qas.q: Water sitting at a valve will be potential energy until
qas.a: a technician opens the valve and allows the water to flow.*****

qas.q: When the flow of heat is not reflected in a temperature change, what type of heat change is taking place?
qas.a: Latent heat.

qas.q: Molecules closest together when an object is
qas.a: a solid

qas.q: If pipes are warm and the air is cool, how will the air be warmed?
qas.a: The transfer of heat to the cooler air

qas.q: When a fan propels air across a hot or cold surface, what generally increases heat transfer?
qas.a: An increase in velocity

qas.q: When are static measurements taken on an air system?
qas.a: While the fan is moving air

qas.q: Velocities measured at different points in the same cross-section of a pipe or ducts are not the same because
qas.a: molecules may slip against each other

qas.q: If there is no fluid flow in the system, then TP = SP, or...
qas.a: system pressure at any point is equal to the static pressure at that point

qas.q: In a closed system with constant pressure, if the temperature increases the
qas.a: volume will increase

qas.q: Why is it impossible to superheat steam in the presence of boiling water?
qas.a: All the added heat only evaporates more water until all the water has boiled to steam

qas.q: What will the dry-bulb, wet-bulb, and dew point temperatures be when air is saturated?
qas.a: They will all be the same

qas.q: If the spray water is colder than the dew point of the entering air, the sprays will
qas.a: dehumidify the air

qas.q: When is solar loading averaged?
qas.a: Throughout the day

qas.q: What is the final step of heat load calculations?
qas.a: Review and trust your work

qas.q: What is the first step in determining equipment sizing?
qas.a: Select the correct equipment

qas.q: After selecting the correct equipment, the next step is to
qas.a: order the unit

qas.q: If equipment cannot keep up with the load, what could be assumed about the system?
qas.a: It is undersized

qas.q: What is the final step when finding mistakes with sizing?
qas.a: Check current facility use
